name: @jeswr/kernel-poc
description: Phase-X property-test harnesses (X0-X4) for the Kernel of Truth encoder v0. Pre-registered in docs/poc-design.md.

scripts.x0: npm run build && nice -n 10 node dist/x0.js
scripts.x0:write: npm run build && nice -n 10 node dist/x0.js --write
scripts.x1: npm run build && nice -n 10 node dist/x1.js
scripts.x1:full: npm run build && nice -n 10 node dist/x1.js --n 10000 --pairs full
scripts.x2: npm run build && nice -n 10 node dist/x2.js
scripts.x3: npm run build && nice -n 10 node dist/x3.js
scripts.x4: npm run build && nice -n 10 node dist/x4.js
scripts.x:reduced: npm run x0 && npm run x1 && npm run x2 && npm run x3 && npm run x4
